source_article_title: Emmy Adelle shares dreamy melodic-house single ‘Polaroids’: Listen

open_graph.og:title: Emmy Adelle shares dreamy melodic-house single 'Polaroids': Listen
open_graph.og:description: Emmy Adelle has shared her new melodic-house single 'Polaroids', written in the haze between real memory and imagination. Out now on Spotify and all major platforms.
open_graph.twitter:creator: @weraveyou

source_article_title: Aiken delivers summer house anthem ‘Like Home’ with Sonny Fodera energy: Listen

open_graph.og:title: Aiken delivers summer house anthem 'Like Home' with Sonny Fodera energy: Listen
open_graph.og:description: Aiken has released summer house single 'Like Home', a nostalgic, piano-led, sunset-tailored cut that lands somewhere between Sonny Fodera and MK.
open_graph.twitter:creator: @weraveyou

source_article_title: Madonna and Sabrina Carpenter unleash ‘Bring Your Love’, lead single from ‘Confessions II’

open_graph.og:title: Madonna and Sabrina Carpenter unleash 'Bring Your Love', lead single from 'Confessions II'
open_graph.og:description: Madonna and Sabrina Carpenter's 'Bring Your Love' is out now, lead single from 'Confessions II' (July 3, Warner Records). Stuart Price co-produces; samples Inner City's 'Good Life'.
open_graph.twitter:creator: @weraveyou

source_article_title: David Guetta drops official remix of Milky’s ‘Just The Way You Are’ sampling Stardust

open_graph.og:title: David Guetta drops official remix of Milky's 'Just The Way You Are' sampling Stardust
open_graph.og:description: David Guetta has released his official remix of Milky's 'Just The Way You Are', sampling Stardust's 'Music Sounds Better With You'. Out May 1.

open_graph.og:title: Denis First unveils feel-good house anthem 'La La La'
open_graph.og:description: Denis First has dropped 'La La La', a feel-good house anthem framed as a sonic reset for the overthinking generation, out now.
